input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_base_logos.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Testing Base logo URLs..."
echo ""

# Test various Base logo sources
echo "1. TrustWallet Base logo:"
curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/info/logo.png" | grep "HTTP" | head -1

echo ""
echo "2. Base official (coinbase CDN):"
curl -sI "https://assets.base.org/img/base-logo.svg" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1

echo ""
echo "3. Alternative Base logo:"
curl -sI "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/108554348" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1

echo ""
echo "4. CoinGecko Base:"
curl -sI "https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/31164/small/base.png" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1

EOF

chmod +x /tmp/test_base_logos.sh
/tmp/test_base_logos.sh

state.output:
